overall.description: First-person vehicle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, driving through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The vehicle navigates from wide downtown boulevards with green neon signage through intersections and into narrow industrial alleys with colorful shipping containers.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown boulevard with commercial signage

events.description: vehicle slows down from cruising speed to near stop approaching intersection

agents.ego_description: cruising down the neon-lit main avenue in a futuristic vehicle, slowing down as approaching an intersection

entered.detail: tall vertical neon sign with purple lettering mounted on building facade
massive curved digital screen displaying green holographic figure and advertisements
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a futuristic vehicle driving down a wide neon-lit boulevard. A prominent purple neon hotel sign stands on the right while a massive green digital billboard displays a holographic figure. The vehicle slows down as it approaches an intersection ahead, with the dense cyberpunk skyline filling the background.

events.description: vehicle accelerates from slow speed back to cruising speed

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the downtown corridor, passing illuminated storefronts and Asian-inspired signage

entered.detail: illuminated sign with Asian characters and red neon accents marking a storefront

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates through the commercial district, passing a prominent Tengu sign with red neon accents on the left. The large green billboard from the previous segment falls behind as the hotel sign moves to the left side of the frame. The street remains wide and open with the cyberpunk skyline continuing to dominate the horizon.

events.description: vehicle makes a right turn at the intersection
vehicle comes to a complete stop at red traffic light

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and coming to a stop at the traffic signal, waiting for the light to change

entered.detail: suspended traffic signal showing red light above the intersection

segments.scene_description: The vehicle executes a right turn at the intersection, bringing the neon hotel sign closer on the left side. The Tengu sign disappears behind as the vehicle approaches a traffic light. The vehicle comes to a complete stop at the red light, with construction barriers becoming visible on the right side of the road ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow downtown street with construction barriers

events.description: vehicle accelerates from stop through the green light
transitioning from wide intersection to narrow street with construction zones

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the green light and proceeding down a narrower street lined with construction barriers and industrial facades

entered.detail: orange and white striped barriers lining the right side of the narrow road
tall concrete industrial structures with minimal lighting and small windows

segments.scene_description: Accelerating through the intersection as the light changes, the vehicle enters a narrower street flanked by industrial buildings on the left and construction barriers on the right. The sky becomes mostly obscured by the tall structures, and the lighting shifts to a mix of neon and artificial sources. The hotel sign and traffic light fall behind as the vehicle proceeds deeper into the industrial zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service alley with shipping containers

events.description: entering industrial alley with colorful stacked shipping containers
slowing down approaching security checkpoint gate

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow industrial alley with colorful containers, slowing as approaching a security gate checkpoint

entered.detail: stacked orange and teal shipping containers creating a corridor wall with industrial texture
large digital screens displaying advertisements mounted on the container walls
metal gate structure with red warning lights blocking the alley ahead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a narrow industrial service alley lined with colorful orange and teal shipping containers on the right, replacing the construction barriers. Large digital billboards are mounted on the container walls, displaying various advertisements. The vehicle slows down as it approaches a security gate with red warning lights blocking the path ahead, while the industrial buildings create an enclosed corridor with no visible sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a wide, neon-lit commercial boulevard into a claustrophobic industrial alley. It begins by cruising past a purple hotel sign and a massive green holographic billboard under a sprawling cyberpunk skyline. As the vehicle accelerates through the district, passing a red Tengu sign, it executes a right turn and comes to a brief halt at a red light beside construction barriers. The scene then shifts as the vehicle accelerates through the intersection, leaving the open skyline behind to enter a narrower street flanked by towering industrial buildings. Finally, the environment closes in completely as the vehicle glides into a service alley lined with orange and teal shipping containers and digital advertisements, slowing to a stop before a security gate with red warning lights.
